headline: Reduce 48 minutes of build-related time loss for backend Go developer using repeated build and test loops
subheadline: Structured visibility into slow go compilation in development pipelines during local development plus CI pipelines for Go services
target_user: backend Go developer using repeated build and test loops
pain_summary: 48 minutes of development time are lost per day
solution_promise: backend Go developer using repeated build and test loops gets faster iteration with materially lower build feedback delay
value_proposition: Turn recurring build delay into measurable time savings and clearer optimization priorities.
cta: Paste build timing data and get an immediate optimization brief
